ol.li:
T=2: 150 commands submitted to leader
F1-3 receive via AppendEntries
F0 receives nothing (partitioned)

T=3: Log exceeds threshold (100)
Leader snapshots at index 100
F1-3 also snapshot
Leader's log: [snap@100, 101..160]

T=4: Partition heals
Leader sees F0's nextIndex=11 <= lastIncIdx=100
Leader sends InstallSnapshot RPC

T=5: F0 receives and applies snapshot
Persists snapshot to disk
Restores state machine
Discards old log[1..10]
Receives log[101..160] via AppendEntries
Caught up!
